content.text: The PO-33 features 16 real-time punch-in effects that activate while holding the FX button and pressing pads. Effects apply to the entire mix and create instant variations, glitches, and transitions. Release the pad to return to normal playback.

items: Start playback with the play button
While holding FX, press any pad (1-16) to activate that effect
Keep the pad held for continuous effect
Release the pad to stop the effect instantly

content.caption: FX button with diagonal stripe pattern

content.title: Performance Technique
content.text: Practice timing your effect triggers to land on beats. Use loop effects for build-ups before drops. Use the scratch effect for transitions between patterns.

items: Effects can be combined by quickly switching between pads while holding FX
Loop effects are most effective when triggered on strong beats
Filter effects work well for transitions and breakdowns
The reverse effect is great for creating ear-candy fills
Tape stop creates dramatic endings when timed correctly

content.text: Effects are applied in real-time and cannot be recorded into patterns directly. However, you can use the sync output to record your performance (including effects) to an external device for later use.

content.title: Layering Effects
content.text: While you can only use one pad-based effect at a time, you can create complex sounds by quickly tapping different effect pads in succession.
